adoption-system-a1.task:
Implement the storybook-to-live-app adoption system for the actions dialog. This is a Rust GPUI project.

OBJECTIVE: Create a generic adoption layer so that selecting a design variation in the storybook immediately drives the live actions dialog rendering. Both the storybook preview and the live ActionsDialog::render() must call the SAME shared renderer with the SAME typed style.

ARCHITECTURE (from Oracle consultation):

1. CREATE src/storybook/adoption.rs:
   - VariationId trait: as_str(), name(), description(), from_stable_id()
   - AdoptableSurface trait: associates Id, Spec, Live types + STORY_ID + DEFAULT_ID
   - resolve_surface_live<S>(selected: Option<&str>) -> (S::Live, SurfaceSelectionResolution)
   - adopted_surface_live<S>() -> S::Live (reads from load_selected_story_variant)
   - SurfaceSelectionResolution struct (story_id, requested_variant_id, resolved_variant_id, fallback_used)

2. CREATE src/storybook/actions_dialog_variations/mod.rs:
   - ActionsDialogVariationId enum: Current, Whisper, GhostPills, Typewriter, SingleColumn, InlineKeys, SearchFocused, DotAccent (8 variants)
   - Implement VariationId for ActionsDialogVariationId
   - ActionsDialogStyle struct with typed fields:
     - show_container_border: bool
     - show_header: bool  
     - show_search_divider: bool
     - show_icons: bool
     - selection_opacity: f32 (0.0-1.0)
     - hover_opacity: f32
     - row_height: f32
     - row_radius: f32
     - shortcut_visible: bool
     - mono_font: bool
     - prefix_marker: Option<&'static str>
   - ActionsDialogVariationSpec { id, style }
   - SPECS const array with all 8 variations
   - Implement AdoptableSurface
   - actions_dialog_story_variants() -> Vec<StoryVariant>
   - adopted_actions_dialog_style() -> ActionsDialogStyle
   - Current variant: seeded from existing constants in src/actions/constants.rs (POPUP_WIDTH=320, ACTION_ITEM_HEIGHT=30, SELECTION_RADIUS=6, etc.)
   - Whisper: no borders, no header, selection_opacity=0.04, row_radius=6
   - GhostPills: pill radius=16, border on selection, selection_opacity=0.12
   - Typewriter: mono_font=true, prefix_marker=Some('>'), no icons
   - SingleColumn: no shortcuts visible, no icons
   - InlineKeys: shortcuts inline (not keycaps)
   - SearchFocused: show_search_divider=true
   - DotAccent: selection_opacity=0.0 (uses dot instead)

3. CREATE src/storybook/actions_dialog_variations/tests.rs:
   - ID uniqueness, round-trip, variant coverage, surface prop tests

4. MODIFY src/storybook/mod.rs:
   - Add pub mod adoption
   - Add pub mod actions_dialog_variations
   - Add pub use exports for new types

5. MODIFY src/actions/dialog.rs:
   - At the START of the render method, call adopted_actions_dialog_style() to get the active style
   - Replace the 8 'Whisper:' commented-out border lines with conditional checks on style fields:
     - if style.show_container_border { container.border_1().border_color(...) }
     - if style.show_search_divider { ... }
     - etc.
   - Replace the halved selection_alpha with style.selection_opacity and style.hover_opacity
   - Revert the _ prefixes on unused variables (they'll be used again in conditionals)
   - Import adopted_actions_dialog_style from crate::storybook::actions_dialog_variations

6. MODIFY src/stories/actions_mini_variations.rs:
   - Import resolve_surface_live and the new types
   - In render_variant(), resolve the style from the variant ID, then call the SAME render path
   - Actually: for now, keep the mock renderers but add a comment that they should be replaced with the shared renderer once extracted

KEY FILES:
- src/storybook/selection.rs — existing persistence (load_selected_story_variant)
- src/storybook/footer_variations/mod.rs — reference pattern for adoption
- src/storybook/input_variations/mod.rs — reference pattern for adoption  
- src/storybook/mod.rs — module registration
- src/actions/dialog.rs — the live render target (~2400 lines, search for 'Whisper:' to find the 8 change sites)
- src/actions/constants.rs — existing dimensional constants to seed Current variant
- src/stories/actions_mini_variations.rs — storybook story

CONSTRAINTS:
- Rust GPUI project. Use gpui::* types.
- Theme colors: crate::theme::get_cached_theme(), crate::ui_foundation::HexColorExt
- DO NOT use .when() fluent builder (type inference issues) — use if/else with mut bindings
- Run: cargo check && cargo clippy --lib -- -D warnings
- Existing tests: cargo test --lib storybook
- The dialog.rs render method is in an include!() flat namespace — NO top-level use statements in it. Use fully qualified paths or existing main.rs scope imports.

SUCCESS CONDITION: cargo check passes, cargo clippy --lib -- -D warnings passes, tests pass. The adopted_actions_dialog_style() function returns Current by default (no storybook selection), and returns Whisper when 'whisper' is persisted in the selection store.
adoption-system-a1.notes: [policy] commits touch files outside declared scope

report.taskSummary: Implemented the generic storybook adoption layer for actions dialog variations, wired the live ActionsDialog renderer to the adopted typed style, and added coverage for persisted selection and variation resolution.
